sentiment.reasoning: Exploring strategic alternatives for a business unit is a neutral to positive signal that may lead to value realization.

headlines.headline: Xovol Goods sees mixed results in wireless connectivity pilot program

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
